LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQ. FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT - THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 10, 2012, TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 301 ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR AT 9:00 A.M. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $332.50. ORDER SIGNED. ANTHONY SCHOENBERG, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, 310.858.9771, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Defendant is GRANTED. The matters specified in plaintiff's requests for admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $332.50. Order signed. Anthony Schoenberg, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
